description: Draw the construction profile of a DIN 894 open-ended wrench (size 24mm) in LibreCAD. The drawing must include a 'PROFILE' layer (Color: White/7) featuring a head circle (Center 0,0, Diameter 52mm), a handle end circle (Center 215,0, Diameter 26mm), tangent lines connecting both circles, and a jaw opening defined by horizontal lines starting from X=0 extending left at Y=12 and Y=-12. Additionally, include a 'CENTERS' layer (Color: Red/1) with a horizontal centerline along the X-axis from (-30,0) to (230,0). Save the final drawing as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/din894_wrench.dxf.
